definition: Reduction in people assets ecosystems or functions exposed to disturbance
measurement_note: Must be disaggregated by place population and critical function

definition: Ability to restore essential function after disturbance
measurement_note: Should include recovery time completeness cost and post-recovery condition

definition: Ability to learn revise rules mobilize resources and respond to change
measurement_note: Requires governance learning trust knowledge diversity and funding flexibility

definition: Slack redundancy storage ecological buffers backup capacity and reserve resources
measurement_note: Must test whether backups are maintained and independent

definition: Visibility of unequal exposure access repair recovery burden and participation
measurement_note: Requires disaggregated data and community-informed interpretation

definition: Proximity to tipping points capacity limits early warning signals or regime-shift risk
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger review rather than disappear in averages

definition: Missing delayed low-confidence or unrepresentative data
measurement_note: Absence of data should not be treated as absence of risk

definition: Clarity about what actions follow when indicators worsen
measurement_note: Dashboards should specify responsibility escalation and follow-through
